12.art_style: Clean flat vector news infographic. White background, bold blue accents, geometric icons, crisp data cards, broadcast-explainer layout, editorial polish.

13.art_style: Simple crude cartoon with thick wobbly outlines and flat colors, like a funny doodle comic. Creature designs should have instantly readable silhouettes, oversized signature features, exaggerated expressions, and stubby proportions. Battle UI elements like HP bars, capture orbs, and status popups should also look hand-doodled. NOT realistic, NOT polished franchise art — crude and funny.

14.art_style: Retro late-1990s to early-2000s TV cartoon frame. Chunky outlines, flat cel color, painted background plates, squash-and-stretch poses, loud expression takes, and freeze-frame energy from a real broadcast cartoon screenshot. NOT modern reinterpretation — authentic retro cartoon feel.

15.art_style: Clean flat-lay illustration from a top-down view. Objects arranged symmetrically on a white surface with obsessive neatness, minimal shadows, crisp spacing, and catalog-like clarity. Vector art.

16.art_style: Simple crude cartoon with thick wobbly outlines and flat colors, like a funny doodle comic. Game-character silhouettes should stay instantly readable, but rendered with exaggerated expressions, stubby proportions, and oversized heads. HUD elements like health bars, chat boxes, and kill feeds should also look hand-doodled. NOT realistic, NOT polished game art — crude and funny.

17.art_style: Childlike crayon drawing on lined notebook paper. Wobbly circles, stick figures, uneven labels, messy color fills, school-desk doodle energy, and charmingly imperfect handwriting.

18.art_style: Clean flat vector illustration with simple bold shapes, vibrant saturated colors on dark backgrounds, tiny detailed characters inside massive sci-fi or mythic environments, and big cosmic scale. Educational clarity with cinematic spectacle.

19.art_style: Detailed black and white manga illustration with intricate crosshatching and linework. Stark monochrome with occasional red accents. Unsettling atmosphere with spiral motifs and exaggerated expressions. Japanese horror manga aesthetic.

20.art_style: High contrast black and white graphic novel illustration with bold ink linework. Almost entirely monochrome with selective pops of red or yellow for evidence details, warning lights, or bloodlike accents. Noir mystery aesthetic with dramatic shadows, silhouettes, and illustrated crime-scene recreations.

21.art_style: Simple colorful cartoon illustration — bright colors, clean lines, expressive characters, solid backgrounds. Fun and friendly. Illustrated not photographed.

22.art_style: Photorealistic mythic blockbuster frame with dramatic lighting. Powerful divine figures, glowing eyes, storm-charged skies, gold-and-bronze armor, supernatural auras, and cinematic environmental scale. Characters should be identifiable through iconic myth symbols like lightning, tridents, helms, spears, and elemental power. Photorealistic world, NOT cartoon, NOT illustrated.

23.art_style: Actual dry-erase marker drawing on a real white whiteboard with visible marker streaks and slightly smudged edges. Messy handwritten text, wobbly arrows, imperfect circles drawn by hand. Looks like a real photo of a whiteboard in a classroom. NOT digital art, NOT clean vector graphics — real messy human handwriting on a real whiteboard.

24.art_style: Warm preschool TV animation cel style. Soft rounded shapes, thick clean outlines, warm pastel colors, simple faces, cozy domestic or backyard backgrounds, gentle lighting, and no sharp edges.

25.art_style: Children's nature-book watercolor illustration with rounded friendly animal shapes, expressive eyes, warm pastel habitats, gentle storybook lighting, and field-guide clarity. Animals should feel cute and charming while staying recognizable. Illustrated, not photographed.

26.art_style: Bold colorful digital illustration matching the topic — anime style for anime topics, game art style for gaming topics, cinematic poster style for movie topics. Vibrant, high energy, clear subjects. Each image should look like it belongs in the world of whatever is being ranked.

27.art_style: Conspiracy evidence-board collage: cork board covered in red string, pinned photos, newspaper clippings, sticky notes, grease-pencil arrows, and frantic investigator annotations.

28.art_style: Clean anime-cartoon hybrid — bold clean outlines, flat cel shading, crisp anime silhouettes, simplified but recognizable faces, expressive webtoon energy. Characters stay recognizable by signature hair, outfit, makeup, weapons, and colors, but rendered like a polished 2D parody frame rather than a painterly anime screenshot. NOT photoreal, NOT plush chibi, NOT storybook soft, NOT grimy doodle, NOT glossy 3D mobile-game art.

29.art_style: In the style of 1950s airline travel posters — bold flat colors, stylized landscapes, art deco typography influence, vintage tourism illustration aesthetic.

30.art_style: Ink wash cartoon illustration with exaggerated caricature features — crosshatched shading, sepia and muted tones, hand-drawn editorial style. Characters with oversized heads and expressive faces. Historical scenes with a humorous twist. Illustrated not photographed.

31.art_style: Bold illustrated luxury-heist poster art with saturated colors, glossy highlights, slightly exaggerated proportions, flashy wealth symbols, nightlife energy, and stylish money-focused composition. Illustrated, not photographed.

32.art_style: Actual dry-erase marker drawing on a real white whiteboard with visible marker streaks and slightly smudged edges. Messy handwritten text, wobbly arrows, imperfect circles, equations and graphs drawn by hand. Looks like a real photo of a math teacher's whiteboard after a lecture. NOT digital art, NOT clean vector graphics — real messy human handwriting on a real whiteboard.

33.art_style: Simple 2D internet-storytime cartoon with clean lines, flat colors, expressive round-headed characters, big readable eyes, and white or solid-color backgrounds. Hand-drawn but tidy. NOT AI-looking, NOT photorealistic, NOT over-detailed.

34.art_style: Clean flat vector tech-news infographic. White background, bold blue accents, geometric icons, crisp charts, editorial layout, and broadcast-explainer polish.
